CandyBonanzaRules.Rule1: Candy Bonanza is a 6 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring special symbols that cascades more wins.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

CandyBonanzaRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CandyBonanzaRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
CandyBonanzaRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

CandyBonanzaFeatures.MultiplierExplain1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.MultiplierExplain2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning combinations on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.WildSymbolFeatureExplain1: If there is a winning combination of 6 symbols touching horizontally or vertically, a Wild symbol is awarded at a random position after wins are paid.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.WildSymbolFeatureExplain2: If there is a winning combination of 7 symbols touching horizontally or vertically, 2 Wild symbols are awarded at their respective random positions after wins are paid.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.WildSymbolFeatureExplain3: If there is a winning combination of 8 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically, 3 Wild symbols are awarded at their respective random positions after wins are paid.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.WildSymbolFeatureExplain4: When counting the number of symbols touching horizontally or vertically in a combination for Wild symbol Feature, any Wild symbol in that combination will not be counted.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.BigCandyFeatureExplain1: If there are 4 matching symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Free Spins symbol) adjacent to each other in a square shape, a Big symbol is formed and any wins involving this symbol will be doubled.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Free Spins symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning combinations on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
CandyBonanzaFeatures.FreeSpinExplain4: Any unused Wild symbol on the reels will stay on the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature or until it is involved in any win.

CandyBonanzaCommonRule.WinExplain1: At every spin, any combinations of 5 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
CandyBonanzaCommonRule.WinExplain2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
CandyBonanzaCommonRule.WinExplain3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet level.
